MODULE: cosmos.core.assimilation_skill
FILE: cosmos/core/assimilation_skill.py (338 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Assimilation Skill - HermesAgent Compatible Wrapper
=============================================================

AGI v1.9.5: Wraps the Assimilation Protocol as an installable
Hermes skill. dict agent that installs this skill gains access
to the Cosmos federation.

Skill name: cosmos_assimil

CLASSES:
- AssimilationSkill: HermesAgent-compatible skill wrapper for the Assimilation Protocol.

Maps Hermes
  Methods: async def invoke(self, tool: str, params: dict=None) -> dict
  Methods: def get_skill_metadata(self) -> dict
  Methods: def get_skill_md(self) -> str
  Methods: def generate_package_json(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_assimilation_skill() -> AssimilationSkill
